feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Problem viewing the entire structure of technical objects in Asset Viewer App
entry.content:
Hello, 

I cannot view the entire structure of technical objects in the Asset Viewer app in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. I can only see the structure that branches from a specific object, but I am unable to visualize the full structure as it would appear in IH01, not just the levels below.

What I am able to see is what you can see in the following image:

In the settings, the number of visible lines I have is 30. I also have assigned the correct roles and catalogs. 

 

Thank you in advance for your response.

entry.title: How to Increase the Number of Rows in a Purchase Order?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

In the public cloud "Create Purchase Order-Advanced" app, only three rows of item data are currently displayed.

If the purchase order contains more than three items, I have to scroll up and down to view all the items.

Is there any setting or layout adjustment that allows the PO to display all items at a glance like On Premise version? Thanks.

entry.title: Configuration for the Incoming Supplier Invoices in the E-Document Cockpit for Spain
entry.content:
How to configure the Incoming Invoices from Supplier E-Invoices in E-document cockpit for Spain?



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Assign SAP form EDOC_MY_PDF_INVOICE_FORM in eDocument Mayalsia
entry.content:
How to assign EDOC_MY_PDF_INVOICE_FORM in order to display electronic invoices in PDF format?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud中GUI畫面的【調整使用者介面】問題
entry.content:
向各位專家請教關於 S/4HANA Public Cloud中GUI畫面的【調整使用者介面】，我有以下問題：
1. GUI畫面開啟【調整使用者介面】自行調整UI內容後，可以如何同步給其他USER看到？

2. 在【調整使用者介面】中新增的欄位(如下圖紅框)，有辦法將欄位資訊延伸至日記帳分錄文件中嗎？
以及新增的欄位有沒有可能新增至SAP標準API中，讓外部系統寫入銷售發票時，也可運用此新增欄位？

以上再麻煩專家給予回覆或建議，謝謝。

entry.title: Availability in S/4HANA public cloud about KBA 3351929 - Business Partner Extensions for Japan VAT
entry.content:
Hi

Does anyone know if the following Japanese specific field in the supplier master can be added in S/4HANA Public cloud as same as S/4HANA on-premise?

"Japan: Valid Period for Tax Registration available in the tab Vendor: Country Specific Enh. 3.

We use SAP MDG(Master Data Governance) system and replicate business partner master between S/4HANA on-premise and S/4HANA public cloud.
And now there is a request to have the country specific field "Japan: Valid Period for Tax Registration available in the tab Vendor: Country Specific Enh. 3. " in S/4 public could which is available in S/4 on-premise by adopting the following KBA.

3351929 - Business Partner Extensions for Japan VAT

If it is possible, I would appreciate how to make it available in S/4HANA public cloud.

Thank you!

entry.title: inspection lots not created in "Released" status in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
I have maintained an inspection plan for a raw material by uploading it using the migration cockpit. Then, an inspection lot was generated automatically, but it is showing as in 'Created' status ( CRTD CHCR SPRQ ). I maintained the inspection plan, then tried to assign it to the inspection lot, but it is showing 'Inspection plan not assigned.' Initially, the inspection lot was showing the current date, but after I used the 'Task/Specification Assign' option, it changed to a past date. How can I resolve this issue?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Active Ingredient Management in S/4HANA Cloud Public edition.
entry.content:
Hi,

Where can we find information on Active INgredienat Management of products? We manufacture products which have two units of measure  - litres and Litres of absolute alcohol. Each batch manufactured and sold requires both measures. The one is a percentage of the other (LAA is around 96.4% of L)

 

We will need to use these in production, batch management, stcok valuation as well as sales.

 

Many thanks

Rob

entry.title: Issue with Custom Field Data Flowing from Sales Quotation to Sales Order
entry.content:
We got a requirement to Create a Custom field at Sales Quotation Item level and the Value Given at Quotation level should flow to subsequent Sales Order. The field is getting created in both Sales Quotation and Sales Order but the values which entered at Quotation level are not flowing to Sales order.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Default G/L account during post goods movement 711 and 712
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

During post goods movements (Migo) for stock adjustment (711 712) it is mandatory to fill in a G/L account. Is it possible to fill somewhere a default G/L account per movement type? I checked automatic account determination app but cannot find an option. And in Manage default account assignment, a default cost center can be add to a cost element.

Regards

entry.title: Allow update authorization only (not creation) in "Manage Workforce" app
entry.content:
In "Manage Workforce", is it possible to allow a user to only be able  to update details about existing workers but not to be able to create a worker?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: quality inspection process return the goods to the supplier
entry.content:
Dear 

When the quality inspection process is enabled, after completing the inspection and making the usage decision to return the goods to the supplier, the system automatically generates a material movement to the blocked stock. How should I create a return document to send the goods back to the supplier from the blocked stock?

The issue I encountered is that because the material has quality inspection enabled, when I create the return document then use the app post the goods receipt for the purchase document , the system takes the quantity from the quality inspection stock instead of the blocked stock.

Thanks

開啟品質檢驗流程，檢驗完成到判定時選擇退回供應商並產生物料異動至凍結庫存，後續應該如何創建退貨單據將貨品從凍結庫存出回供應商?
我遇到的問題是因為物料有設定品質檢驗，我建立退貨單後用APP過帳採購文件的收貨，系統將拿取品質檢驗倉的數量，而不是凍結庫存倉的數量。

謝謝

entry.title: Reprovisioning system
entry.content:
Hi Experts

In the new Test system, I have made some mistakes while creating master data, such as the bank key, house bank, BP master, etc. I want to clear all of these master data entries and reset the system to its initial state. Note: I already transported all setting from Dev system to Test System. What should I do? What will happen if I do it? 

Regards

entry.title: How to Mass Update or Add Distribution Chains and Sales Organizations in Product Master Data?
entry.content:
I want to mass update or add Distribution Chains(VTWEG) and Sales Organizations(VKORG) for multiple products.

However, when using the Start Mass Maintenance - Products app, I noticed that the VTWEG (Distribution Chain) and VKORG (Sales Organization) fields are not available for selection, and mass maintenance does not seem possible for these fields.

Could anyone guide me on how to perform a mass update or addition of Distribution Chains and Sales Organizations for products? Is there an alternative approach or tool available for this task?

entry.title: Budget Threshold Alerts for Cost Centers
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are using SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and have enabled budget availability control for cost centers. and are wondering if there is any way to set up budget threshold alerting for cost center budgets.

Specifically, we would like to send an email to the cost center responsible (as assigned in the cost center master data) when the budget threshold is nearing 75%, so they do not have to regularly check the Cost Center Budget Report (F3871).

I know that with project budgets, this can be easily done using a predefined situation handling template (EPPM_PROJBUDGETTHRESHOLDEXCEEDED). However, I couldn't find anything similar for cost centers. Does anyone know how this can be achieved with reasonable effort?

Thank you for your help!

Best regards,
Simon

entry.title: Closed configuration in the CBC
entry.content:
Hi, 

Regarding responses to the BDCQ for Quality Management, I have been exploring the configuration related to QM notifications in the CBC. To my surprise, I have found that most of the configuration is locked and cannot be modified, even though the BDCQ asks whether I want to change the configuration. The configurations that are not available are:

  • Define initial screens;
  • Assign catalogs to notification type
  • Define partner determination procedure
  • Assign partner procedure to notification type
  • Assign partner function to notification type 

Please check the attached images. 

Could you please explain the reason why the configuration is locked and whether there is a possibility to unlock it?

Thank you, 

Ana

entry.title: How to set rounding for picking only a full HU or bag, even if the BOM requires less?
entry.content:
Hello!
Do you know how to set a rounding rule or someting for picking that makes the system to generate a warehouse task for moving the full bag or the full handling unit to the PSA and not just the quantity required for the production order?

Example: An ingredient is stored in bags of 5kg. The recipe to be made requires 7 kg of that ingredient, which is the quantity required from production/the factory. The warehouse has to take two bags to the production supply area so the production people manage whatever they need. How to set the Cloud Public system so it generates a warehouse task for moving the full 2 bags and not only 7 kg?

Best regards

entry.title: Define Priorities in Maintenance Management, S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm implementing SAP S/4HANA Asset Management, Public Cloud Edition.

In the different configuration options available through Central Business Configuration, there is one called 'Define Priorities for Each Priority Type.':

What I need to know is whether there is a configuration point where each Priority Type is associated with a Notification Type and an Order Type, given that both notifications and orders have date fields. If not, do I have to understand that the Priority Type Y1 is always assigned to both the Notification Type Y1 and the Order Type YA01? In this case, when is the system intended to use the Priority Type G0?

Additionally, I understand that new Priority Types cannot be defined and that only the standard ones provided by the system can be used.

Grateful for your reply in advance.

entry.title: Failure Mode Group In Create Maintenance Request App
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm working in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition. In Asset Management, I would like to know if it is possible to select a different code group in Create Maintenance Request App, other than YB-PMGNL. I've created a new code group in Catalog D using the Maintain Code Groups App, but this doesn't appear in dropdown menu. So, Is it always necessary to enter a technical object in order to use different code groups?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to create a production order without routing?
entry.content:
I would like to know how to create a production order without routing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
